introSection: Rattlesnake is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently located at Knowsley Safari Park in Prescot, Merseyside, England, UK.
fullText: Rattlesnake is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently located at Knowsley Safari Park in Prescot, Merseyside, England, UK.
